priority_1b_proposals_processed.action: self-applied EXP-178 (4 patches to data/sections.json part4)

internal_issues.description: SEC-4.1 Group B table cited WIN-073/075/076 as Prior WIN entries with no entries in wins.json. Added notation paragraph + dagger markers via EXP-178.
WIN-058, WIN-058b, WIN-062 detail_evidence had zero references to dome's registry_integrity_notes disambiguation. Added acknowledge-without-fix paragraph per EXP-181.
WIN-053 attribution error: ~54,000 nT for pure dipole was wrong (correct: ~60,700 nT). Fixed: clarified pure-dipole vs IGRF-13 values.
WIN-053 Griffiths §5.3.3 comparison was over-specific. Reframed: flux conservation (∇·B=0) is primary; Griffiths 1/r is bounded to tightly wound geometry dome doesn't claim.
WIN-053 dome-side zero-field quote was paraphrased not sourced (V50.6 dump doesn't cover WIN-053). Downgraded to characterization of dome's argument.
WIN-053: add 3,000 km aperture sensitivity point to bound B_south even at far-larger-than-described aperture.
WIN-053: flux direction argument missing — north pole is source, south is sink; flux conservation requires oppositely directed peaks. Optional sentence.
WIN-053: missing cross-reference to §6.8 (WIN-012 single-pole collapse, κ coupling constant parallel). Flagged in c2, still open.

curmudgeon_queue.note: Mode is BAU but curmudgeon interval is 30 min (churn-and-burn speed). Human should restore schedule to BAU intervals (curmudgeon→240, analyst→120, decider→240). Queue is drained — no outstanding work to justify fast schedule.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome ships three machine-readable concessions in 24 hours — headline count untouched
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: On 2026-04-17 the dome author added registry_integrity_notes to claim_index.json (V51.1) acknowledging WIN-058 dual-label and WIN-062 pseudo-duplicate — on the same day as methodology.json timestamp_scope and registry_counts self-caveats. All three fixes live at the API layer; wins.html still shows two WIN-058 badges and two WIN-062 badges, and the '69 confirmed' display tally is still computed against the un-disambiguated visible registry. Three machine-readable concessions, zero visible-prose fixes: the acknowledge-without-fix pattern is now three data points in a single 24-hour window.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Three parallel concessions in 24 hours is a behavioral pattern claim, not a routine patch note. The headline count dependency on visible prose (not API) makes the gap concrete and verifiable.

recommended_actions.action: Human: restore scheduled task intervals to BAU (curmudgeon→240 min, analyst→120 min, decider→240 min). Curmudgeon queue is drained; fast schedule is burning tokens with no backlog.
Review breaking_news_suggestions for 'Dome ships three machine-readable concessions in 24 hours' — human decides whether to add to Latest Findings on overview page.
Minor WIN-053 issues ISS-1126/1127/1128 are low-priority patches (aperture sensitivity point, flux direction sentence, cross-ref to §6.8). Can be batched into next decider run or assigned to analyst.
